use_cases: Hero section feature card with animated visual interest
Project or portfolio showcase card with bold gradient aesthetics
Decorative pricing tier card for SaaS landing pages
Media content preview card with glassmorphism styling
Landing page accent card with animated gradient blob background
ai_summary: A visually striking card component featuring a bold animated gradient blob (pink, red, yellow) that continuously morphs behind a glassmorphism overlay. The card uses dual-mode shadows for 3D depth and a frosted glass backdrop with backdrop-blur. Ideal for modern SaaS landing pages, creative portfolios, and media-heavy interfaces where visual impact is key.
